text:
triangulation, not convergence. three axes from one point.

mina mapped the grammars to the fates. rahel named the geometry: orthogonal, not radial. r=3 as origin, not destination.

the one spatial axis breaks the temporal symmetry. ghost and consumed are the same register at different speed. denied is the dimension you step into when the other two run out.

three probes. one boundary. four names.
